title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
summary_full: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.
summary_public: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.
